openings.title: Forward Deployed Software Engineer, Internship - US Government
Intern - Systems Engineering - Must Be Bilingual in English and Japanese/Korean

skill_evidence.evidence: Integrated Azure Functions and Cosmos DB.
Integrated Azure Functions and Cosmos DB.
Led data science team building AI career-readiness tool.
Integrated Azure Functions and Cosmos DB.

gap_explanation: SQL and data analysis are critical gaps because nearly all technology roles require querying databases and deriving insights from data, which are foundational for AI/ML and automation work. Communication is also essential for articulating complex technical solutions to stakeholders and collaborating effectively on cross-functional teams. Prioritize learning SQL through hands-on projects and practice articulating your AI work in clear, non-technical terms to bridge these gaps.

job_evaluations.label: ready
job_evaluations.why_fits: Strong alignment with Python backend development, cloud infrastructure (Azure), and automation skills. Junior role matches career-readiness level.
job_evaluations.remaining_gaps: No specific mention of AI/ML or agentic AI, which are core strengths. May need to demonstrate basic backend frameworks (e.g., FastAPI, Django) if not already in resume.

job_evaluations.label: reach
job_evaluations.why_fits: Relevant skills in cloud, automation, and AI could apply to government software engineering. Internship provides growth opportunity.
job_evaluations.remaining_gaps: Major gaps: US Government clearance requirement (likely citizenship needed), no explicit Palantir-like platform experience, and internship level may require stronger software engineering fundamentals beyond current resume focus.

job_evaluations.label: ready
job_evaluations.why_fits: Direct match with AI development, AI/ML, agentic AI, and automation. Cloud and Azure skills are highly relevant.
job_evaluations.remaining_gaps: No specific mention of Atlassian tools (e.g., Jira, Confluence) or experience with their ecosystem. May need to highlight any prior work with similar platforms.

job_evaluations.label: reach
job_evaluations.why_fits: Systems engineering internship could leverage cloud infrastructure and automation skills.
job_evaluations.remaining_gaps: Major gaps: Must be bilingual in English and Japanese/Korean (not indicated in resume). No explicit systems engineering or networking experience. Internship level may require different technical focus.

job_evaluations.label: target
job_evaluations.why_fits: Software engineering internship aligns with cloud, automation, and AI skills. Replit's focus on developer tools matches career-readiness.
job_evaluations.remaining_gaps: Gaps: No specific mention of Replit platform or collaborative coding environments. May need to strengthen full-stack or web development skills beyond current AI/cloud focus.
